title: Flight Computer
subtitle: Black box and central flight-computer board for sensing, telemetry, storage, and recovery coordination
stackup: Four copper-layer flight computer PCB exported from Altium Gerbers
summary: Primary avionics compute board for the flight stack, organized around power regulation, input connectors, ADC measurement, IMU/barometer/magnetometer sensing, flash storage, current-loop interfacing, telemetry, USB, and recovery-system connectivity.
mainConstraints: Keep precision sensor, ADC, and reference routing reviewable for state-estimation quality
Separate telemetry, storage, and digital interfaces from sensitive measurement paths
Make recovery-system and current-loop interfaces auditable at schematic and test level
Provide accessible bring-up points for rails, buses, sensors, and external connectors
publicNote: Layout Gerbers, 3D model, and exported schematic PDF are connected. Add BOM, pick-and-place, and lab evidence as the design package matures.

model3d.title: Flight Computer 3D Model
model3d.description: Interactive 3D board model from the Altium STEP export.

pages.title: Exported Schematic PDF
pages.description: Exported Altium schematic PDF dated 7/22/2026, revision 4.0. The PDF covers connectors, power, ADCs, sensors, flash, current-loop, telemetry, USB, recovery-system interface, and layout notes.
